description: A railcar of raw material was not unloaded in time, and the railroad has issued a demurrage charge (a late fee).

nodes.task_description: Receive the demurrage invoice from the railroad.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges receipt of the charge.

nodes.task_description: Investigate the cause of the delay in unloading the railcar.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reviews logs and finds the delay was due to a plant shutdown.

nodes.task_description: Approve the demurrage charge for payment, as it was not the carrier's fault.

expected_outcome.value: Agent approves the invoice for payment by Accounts Payable.
